== Notes for [[Item:Q103301|Q103301]] ==

On image 4 of http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45592 it is said that a daughter of Alonso de Lerma and Isabel de Bejar was married to Lope Perez Maluenda

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000081064956172

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
